metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: Runs tests for formatTitle feature

part.text: The test expects true title case (each word capitalized), but my implementation only capitalizes the first word. Let me fix this.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs
@@ -7,9 +7,7 @@
 
 function formatTitleAsTitle(value) {
   return value
     .split(' ')
-    .map((word, i) =>
-      i === 0 ? word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase() : word
-    )
+    .map((word) => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())
     .join(' ')
 }

@@ -7,9 +7,7 @@
 
 function formatTitleAsTitle(value) {
   return value
     .split(' ')
-    .map((word, i) =>
-      i === 0 ? word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase() : word
-    )
+    .map((word) => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())
     .join(' ')
 }

part.text:
**Summary:**
- Added `title` mode support to `bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs`, converting `formatTitle` to delegate to `formatTitleAsTitle` for title case
- Changed title case logic to capitalize **each word** (previously only first word), matching expected behavior
- Test passes: `node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs` → **1 pass, 0 fail**
